1.description: Get kommunenummer and geometry for Drammen municipality

2.description: Get buildings (representation points) in Drammen by kommunenummer

5.description: Select buildings that intersect 200-year flood zones

6.description: Find nearest quick-clay zone for each building (from step 5)

7.description: Sort buildings by nearest quick-clay distance ascending

args.sql:
SELECT ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(ST_Collect(omrade))) AS minx,
       ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(ST_Collect(omrade))) AS miny,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(ST_Collect(omrade))) AS maxx,
       ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(ST_Collect(omrade))) AS maxy
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE lower(kommunenavn) = 'drammen';

2.description: get buildings in Drammen (by kommunenummer filter)

5.description: keep buildings that intersect 200-year flood zones (buildings ∩ floodzones)

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE lower(kommunenavn) = 'drammen';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT bygningsnummer, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '3301';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid, flomsoneid, gjentaksintervall, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --
